Created attachment 185476
luakit 2017.08.10 r1

I've uploaded a new diff based on the current SVN HEAD tree that contains the last commit already. So you can just add it on top to correct the plist file.

It also contains the NOT_FOR_ARCH_REASON fix and the $(PREFIX) -> ${PREFIX} fix.

I've added PORTREVISION= 1
